final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: professional sports photography, editorial photo
Primary request: NBA Finals highlight moment of a star player wearing jersey #23 executing a powerful slam dunk while double-teamed by two defenders
Scene/backdrop: packed NBA arena with tens of thousands of standing cheering fans, court floor with visible brand logos and boundary lines, professional basketball court
Subject: star basketball player wearing jersey #23, muscular physique with visible muscle definition, explosive and focused facial expression, perfect athletic arc in mid-air, two defending players attempting to block
Style/medium: professional sports photography, high-speed action capture
Composition/framing: low-angle upward shot emphasizing height and explosive power, player as central focal point, background crowd forming spectacular bokeh
Lighting/mood: professional multi-point high-brightness arena lighting, unified color temperature, dramatic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: court wood tones, team jersey colors, bright arena whites, crowd multicolor blur
Materials/textures: realistic sweat on skin, fabric texture of jerseys, polished wooden court floor, glossy court markings
Constraints: preserve jersey number 23, keep both defenders visible in frame, maintain sharp focus on dunking player, court logos must be legible
Avoid: motion blur, plastic skin, deformed hands, watermark, oversaturated colors, amateur lighting
